blocks.text: 驭 龙 师 是 最弱 职业 ? I'M  DRAKO  MAJSTRO
blocks.translation: Is Dragon Tamer the weakest class? I’m Drako Majstro

blocks.text: GEMIN
blocks.translation: Gemini

blocks.text: READ  AT MANHUAFAST.NET
blocks.translation: Read at ManhuaFast.net

blocks.text: FASTEST  UPDATES
blocks.translation: Fastest updates

blocks.text: NEW  COMICS
blocks.translation: New comics

blocks.text: ACTIVE  COMMUNITY
blocks.translation: Active community

blocks.text: WHAT  DO  WE DO ?  THAT  DEMON IS  HERE - AND  SHE BROUGHT  MORE PEOPLE  THAN US !
blocks.translation: What do we do? That demon’s here—and she brought more people than us!

blocks.text: TSK ...  IS  THIS DRAGON  NATION GUY  FROM  HER GANG ?  RETREAT FAST !
blocks.translation: Tsk... Is that Dragon Nation guy one of her crew? Fall back, now!

blocks.text: RUN !  IF  WE DON'T ,  WE'RE ALL  DEAD !
blocks.translation: Run! If we don’t, we’re all dead!

blocks.text: THE  SOUTHERN  NATION GUYS  THINK  I'M  PART  OF THIS  GANG ?  THEY  TOOK OFF  AS  SOON  AS  THEY SAW  HER - THIS  SO - CALLED GIRL  " DEMON "  MUST BE  A  BIG  DEAL .
blocks.translation: They think I'm with this gang? The Southern Nation fled the moment they saw her—this so-called "Demon" must be something else.

blocks.text: THOSE  SOUTHERN DOGS  AMBUSHED  OUR HEAVENLY  DRAGON  GANG BEFORE .  TODAY ,  WE  MUST HUNT  THEM  DOWN  AND MAKE  THEM  PAY  WITH THEIR  LIVES !
blocks.translation: Those Southern dogs ambushed our Heavenly Dragon Gang before. Today, we make them pay with their lives!

blocks.text: MISS ,  DO  WE PURSUE ?  IT'S YOUR  CALL .
blocks.translation: Miss, do we chase them? Your call.

blocks.text: RD  快 看 漫画
..NO  NEED  TO CHASE .  I  CAN MAKE  THEM PAY  JUST  THE SAME .
blocks.translation: No need to chase. I'll make them pay just the same.

blocks.text: EH ...  EH !?
blocks.translation: EH... EH!?

blocks.text: TURN  BACK ! RUN  THE OTHER  WAY !
blocks.translation: TURN BACK! RUN THE OTHER WAY!

blocks.text: HMPH .  YOU THINK  YOU CAN  RUN ?
blocks.translation: HMPH. YOU THINK YOU CAN ESCAPE?

blocks.text: NO .... !  HELP , SAVE  ME !
blocks.translation: NO...! HELP ME! SAVE ME!

blocks.text: COUGH , COUGH ...  SPARE ME !  I  DON'T WANT  TO  DIE !
blocks.translation: COUGH, COUGH... PLEASE, SPARE ME! I DON'T WANT TO DIE!

blocks.text: TSK  TSK  TSK . DYING  TO  A  SKILL LIKE  THAT ... SOUTHERNERS ARE  AS  WEAK  AS EVER .
blocks.translation: Tsk tsk tsk. Dying to a move like that... Southerners are as weak as ever.

blocks.text: LAO  JIU ,  YOU KNOW  EVERYONE IN  SOUTH  BLACK PORT - WHO'S THAT  GUY ?
blocks.translation: Lao Jiu, you know everyone at South Black Port—who's that guy?

blocks.text: HMM ? STRANGE , I  DON'T  RECOGNIZE HIM .  HE'S  DEFINITELY NOT  FROM  SOUTH BLACK  PORT .
blocks.translation: Hmm? Odd, I don’t recognize him. Definitely not from South Black Port.

blocks.text: IF  HE'S  NOT  FROM SOUTH  BLACK  PORT , THEN  HE'S  NOT  FROM THE  SOUTHERN NETHER  GANG  OR FLAME  GANG EITHER .
blocks.translation: If not from South Black Port, then he's not with the Southern Nether Gang or Flame Gang either.

blocks.text: IN  THAT  CASE , HE  CAN  ONLY BE  FROM  THE SOUTHERN NATION .
blocks.translation: Then he can only be from the Southern Nation.

blocks.text: BOLD  SOUTHERN DOG - SEEING  ME AND  STILL  NOT RUNNING ...
blocks.translation: Bold southern dog—sees me and still doesn’t run...

blocks.text: LAO  QING , LAO  JIU - KILL HIM !
blocks.translation: Lao Qing, Lao Jiu—kill him!

blocks.text: GO !
blocks.translation: Go!

blocks.text: SOUTHERN  DOG ! I'LL  SEND  YOU ON  YOUR  WAY !
blocks.translation: Southern dog! I'll send you off for good!

blocks.text: THE  SOUTHERN GUYS THINK  I'M  WITH  YOU , AND  YOU  THINK  I'M SOUTHERN - THIS  IS RIDICULOUS .
blocks.translation: The southern crew thinks I’m with you, and you think I’m southern—this is absurd.

blocks.text: LAO  JIU ,  BE CAREFUL - THIS
blocks.translation: Lao Jiu, be careful—this

blocks.text: PERSON  SEEMS VERY  STRONG . ,
blocks.translation: That person looks really strong.

blocks.text: HAHAHA !  DON'T I  KNOW  EXACTLY HOW  CAPABLE SOUTHERN  NATION FIGHTERS  ARE ?
blocks.translation: Hahaha! Don’t I know just how fierce the Southern Nation fighters are?

blocks.text: SIGH ...  LOOKS LIKE  I'LL  HAVE TO  CALM  YOU DOWN  FIRST .
blocks.translation: Sigh... looks like I’ll have to settle you down first.

blocks.text: [ REPEL  THE WEAK ] !
blocks.translation: [REPEL THE WEAK]!

blocks.text: UGH !?
blocks.translation: Ugh!?

blocks.text: REPEL  THE  WEAK :  RELEASES  DRACONIC  KILLING INTENT ,  DEALING  DEFENSE - IGNORING  DAMAGE  AND KNOCKBACK  TO  ALL  NEARBY  ENEMIES .  DAMAGE  IS DETERMINED  BY  THE  ATTRIBUTE  GAP ;  THE  LARGER  THE GAP ,  THE  HIGHER  THE  DAMAGE .
blocks.translation: REPEL THE WEAK: Unleashes draconic killing intent, dealing defense-ignoring damage and knockback to all nearby enemies. Damage scales with attribute difference—the greater the gap, the higher the damage.

blocks.text: MASTER  QING AND  MASTER  JIU WERE  BLASTED AWAY !?
blocks.translation: MASTER QING AND MASTER JIU HAVE BEEN BLOWN AWAY!?

blocks.text: DON'T PANIC !  I'LL HELP  YOU !
blocks.translation: DON'T PANIC! I'LL HELP YOU!

blocks.text: STOP ,  TELL YOUR  PEOPLE TO  STAND DOWN .
blocks.translation: STOP! ORDER YOUR MEN TO STAND DOWN.

blocks.text: HE'S  TAKEN THE  BOSS HOSTAGE !
blocks.translation: HE'S TAKING THE BOSS HOSTAGE!

blocks.text: HOW  IS  THAT POSSIBLE !? RIGHT  IN  FRONT OF  US ... !
blocks.translation: HOW IS THAT EVEN POSSIBLE?! RIGHT BEFORE OUR EYES...!

blocks.text: I'M  LU  FAN ,  THE FLAME  GUARDIAN FIGHTING  THE ANCIENT  GOD . I'M  NOT  YOUR ENEMY .
blocks.translation: I'M LU FAN, THE FLAME GUARDIAN FIGHTING THE ANCIENT GOD. I'M NOT YOUR ENEMY.

blocks.text: I  KNOW LU  FAN ... BROTHERS , LOWER  YOUR WEAPONS . ,
blocks.translation: I KNOW LU FAN... BROTHERS, LOWER YOUR WEAPONS.

blocks.text: YOU'RE  STRONG ,  BUT CLAIMING  TO  BE  THE LU  FAN  WHO  CAN SLAY  AN  ANCIENT GOD - WHAT  PROOF DO  YOU  HAVE ?
blocks.translation: You’re strong, but claiming to be Lu Fan, the ancient godslayer—what proof do you have?

blocks.text: IT  SEEMS  LONGNAN PREFECTURE  IS  AS ISOLATED  AS  THE WESTERN  FRONTIER .  AT MOST ,  PEOPLE  KNOW MY  NAME  BUT  NOT MY  FACE .
blocks.translation: Seems Longnan Prefecture is as isolated as the Western Frontier. At most, people know my name, not my face.

blocks.text: THEN ...
blocks.translation: Then...

blocks.text: DO  YOU RECOGNIZE THIS ?
blocks.translation: Do you recognize this?

blocks.text: THIS  MEDAL .... ARE  YOU  TRULY LU  FAN !?
blocks.translation: This medal... are you really Lu Fan?!

blocks.text: OUR  DEEPEST APOLOGIES !  WE FAILED  TO  RECOGNIZE GREATNESS - WE NEVER  EXPECTED  THE LEGENDARY DRAGON TAMER  LU  FAN  TO BE  HERE .
blocks.translation: Our deepest apologies! We failed to see greatness—we never expected the legendary Dragon Tamer Lu Fan to be here.

blocks.text: NO  WONDER  HE DEFEATED  US  IN  ONE MOVE ...  LAO  QING , YOU  HAD  GOOD INSTINCTS .
blocks.translation: No wonder he defeated us in one move... Lao Qing, you had good instincts.

blocks.text: I  NEVER THOUGHT I'D  MEET  A  LEGEND AT  MY  AGE .  I'M NOT DREAMING , AM  I ...
blocks.translation: I never thought I'd meet a legend at my age. This isn’t a dream, is it...?

blocks.text: WE'RE  THE HEAVENLY  DRAGON GANG  OF SOUTH BLACK  PORT . I'M THE  LEADER , CUI ZIYI .
blocks.translation: We're the Heavenly Dragon Gang from South Black Port. I'm the leader, Cui Ziyi.

blocks.text: CUI  ZIYI - LEVEL  109 , TURBULENT  MAGE  IV ,  LEADER  OF THE  HEAVENLY  DRAGON  GANG
blocks.translation: CUI ZIYI - LEVEL 109, TURBULENT MAGE IV, LEADER OF THE HEAVENLY DRAGON GANG

blocks.text: I'M  THE  YOUNGER AND  MORE  HANDSOME OF  THE  TWO  DEPUTIES- JUST  CALL  ME  LAO  JIU . THERE'S  NO  ONE  IN SOUTH  BLACK  PORT  I DON'T  KNOW .
blocks.translation: I'm the younger, better-looking of the two deputies—just call me Lao Jiu. Nobody in South Black Port doesn't know me.

blocks.text: LAO  JIU - LEVEL  99 ,  LONGSWORD WARRIOR  IV ,  DEPUTY  OF  THE HEAVENLY  DRAGON  GANG
blocks.translation: LAO JIU - LEVEL 99, LONGSWORD WARRIOR IV, DEPUTY OF THE HEAVENLY DRAGON GANG

blocks.text: LAO  QING - LEVEL  102 ,  GALE STALKER  IV ,  DEPUTY  OF  THE HEAVENLY  DRAGON  GANG
blocks.translation: LAO QING - LEVEL 102, GALE STALKER IV, DEPUTY OF THE HEAVENLY DRAGON GANG

blocks.text: I'M  LAO  QING ... THE  OTHER  DEPUTY . THANK  YOU  FOR SHOWING  MERCY EARLIER ,  MR .  LU .
blocks.translation: I'm Lao Qing... the other deputy. Thanks for showing mercy earlier, Mr. Lu.

blocks.text: " HEAVENLY DRAGON  GANG " ... THAT  NAME SOUNDS  A  BIT ... DATED .
blocks.translation: "Heavenly Dragon Gang"... that name feels kinda... outdated.

blocks.text: HUH ?
blocks.translation: Huh?

blocks.text: SIGH ...  THE OLD  BOSS NAMED  IT ,  AND MISS  DOESN'T WANT  TO CHANGE  IT ,
blocks.translation: Sigh... the old boss named it, and Miss won’t change it.

blocks.text: I  TOLD  YOU IT'D  SOUND AWKWARD WHEN INTRODUCING IT .
blocks.translation: I told you it’d sound awkward introducing ourselves with that name.

blocks.text: WEREN'T  YOU  SENT BY  THE  CAPITAL  TO FIGHT  THE  BEAST TIDE ?  WHY  ARE  YOU LIKE  THIS ? HERE  IN  A  PLACE
blocks.translation: Weren't you sent by the capital to fight the Beast Tide? Why are you like this? Here, in a place like this?

blocks.text: I  DID  GO  TO  THE FAR  NORTH ,  BUT  TO FIGHT  THE  ANCIENT GOD ,  I  NEED  TO COMPLETE  MY  FOURTH ADVANCEMENT QUICKLY .
blocks.translation: I did go to the far north, but to fight the ancient god, I need to quickly reach my fourth advancement.

blocks.text: I  TEACHER  TOLD  ME THE  MATERIALS  I NEED  ARE  IN  THE ABYSS  AT  THE LONGNAN  BORDER .
blocks.translation: My teacher said the materials I need are in the abyss at the Longnan border.

blocks.text: FOURTH ADVANCEMENT ? WAIT - SO  YOU HAVEN'T EVEN BROKEN PAST LEVEL  90 !?
blocks.translation: Fourth advancement? Wait—so you haven't even surpassed level 90!?

blocks.text: TO  BE  DEFEATED  BY SOMEONE  STILL  AT THIRD  ADVANCEMENT ... HOW  EMBARRA- SSING ...
blocks.translation: Losing to someone still at third advancement... how humiliating...

blocks.text: THE  BORDER ABYSS ... YOU  WEREN'T  TRICKED , WERE  YOU ?  NO  ONE USES  MATERIALS  FROM THERE  FOR ADVANCEMENT .
blocks.translation: The border abyss... You weren't fooled, right? No one uses materials from there to advance.

blocks.text: BUT  LOSING  TO  A LEGENDARY  YOUTH OF  THE  DRAGON NATION ...  I  CAN ACCEPT  THAT .
blocks.translation: But losing to a legendary youth from the Dragon Nation... I can live with that.

blocks.text: YOU  REALLY DON'T  DWELL  ON THINGS  AT  ALL , DO  YOU ?
blocks.translation: You really don’t fret over things at all, do you?

blocks.text: THIS  PROFESSOR OUYANG  IS  INDEED  A BIT  STRANGE - SENDING ME  FROM  THE  FAR NORTH  TO  THE  FAR SOUTH  FOR MATERIALS .
blocks.translation: Professor Ouyang is definitely a bit odd—sending me from the far north to the far south just for materials.

blocks.text: BUT  MY SENIOR ...  THE PRINCIPAL PERSONALLY
blocks.translation: But my senior... the principal herself

blocks.text: SAID  SHE'S  VERY CAPABLE .  THERE SHOULDN'T  BE  A PROBLEM .
blocks.translation: said she's very capable. This shouldn't be an issue.

blocks.text: SINCE  YOU'RE ALREADY  HERE , I'LL  TAKE  YOU  TO THE  BORDER ABYSS .
blocks.translation: Since you're already here, I'll take you to the Border Abyss.

blocks.text: ONCE  YOU  SEE  IT YOURSELF ,  YOU'LL UNDERSTAND  WHY NO  ONE  USES MATERIALS  FROM HERE .
blocks.translation: Once you see it, you'll get why no one ever uses materials from here.

blocks.text: HALF  AN  HOUR LATER
blocks.translation: Half an hour later

blocks.text: LONGNAN  PREFECTURE  · BORDER  ABYSS
blocks.translation: Longnan Prefecture · Border Abyss

blocks.text: WHAT  A MASSIVE  RIFT- SO  THIS  IS  WHAT SEPARATES  THE TWO  NATIONS ,
blocks.translation: What a massive rift... So this is what divides the two nations.

blocks.text: THIS  IS  IT .  THERE ARE  COUNTLESS SECRET  REALMS , LARGE  AND  SMALL , IN  THE  BORDER ABYSS .
blocks.translation: This is it. Countless secret realms, big and small, lie within the border abyss.

blocks.text: THE TEN  MOST IMPORTANT ONES  ARE HERE .
blocks.translation: Here are the ten most important ones.

blocks.text: WE  ARE CURRENTLY  RIGHT ABOVE  THE  10TH SECRET  REALM .
blocks.translation: We're hovering just above the 10th secret realm right now.

blocks.text: YOU  MEAN ...  MY BREAKTHROUGH MATERIALS  ARE INSIDE  THIS REALM ?
blocks.translation: You mean... my breakthrough materials are inside that realm?

blocks.text: I  CAN'T GUARANTEE  IT , BUT  YOU'LL  HAVE TO  TRY  FOR YOURSELF .
blocks.translation: I can't promise it, but you'll have to check for yourself.

blocks.text: ALRIGHT , THANKS  FOR  THE GUIDANCE .  TIME IS  TIGHT ,  SO  I'M HEADING  OUT NOW .
blocks.translation: Alright, thanks for the guidance. Time's tight, so I'm heading out now.

blocks.text: FOUND  IT .  CUI THERE  REALLY  IS ZIYI  WAS  RIGHT , A  SECRET  REALM HERE .
blocks.translation: Found it. Cui there really is Ziyi was right—a secret realm lies here.

blocks.text: MISS ,  THIS DOESN'T SEEM  LIKE YOU .
blocks.translation: Miss, this doesn't seem like you.

blocks.text: HE'S  THE GUARDIAN  OF  THE FLAME  PREPARING  FOR WAR .  WE  SHOULD  HELP HIM  AND  TELL  HIM THAT  THE  10TH  REALM IS  INACCESSIBLE WITHOUT  A  KEY .
blocks.translation: He's the Guardian of the Flame, preparing for war. We should help him and let him know the 10th realm is locked without the key.

blocks.text: LAO  JIU ,  MISS HAS  HER  OWN PLANS .
blocks.translation: Lao Jiu, Miss has her own plans.

blocks.text: LET  HIM  TRY  IT FOR  HIMSELF .  THEN HIS  GOALS  AND  THE HEAVENLY  DRAGON GANG'S  GOALS  WILL ALIGN .
blocks.translation: Let him prove it himself. Then his goals and the Heavenly Dragon Gang’s will line up.

blocks.text: THIS  WAY , WE  CAN  RIDE  HIS MOMENTUM ,  IN THE  NAME  OF THE  HEAVENLY DRAGON  GANG ,
blocks.translation: That way, we'll ride his momentum under the Heavenly Dragon Gang’s name,

blocks.text: AND COMPLETELY CRUSH  THOSE SOUTHERN GANGS !
blocks.translation: and utterly crush those southern gangs!

blocks.text: visit  and  read  at MANHUAFAST.NET for  the  fastest  releases
